data.title: Ohio is set to start accepting cryptocurrency payments for state fees after months of preparation.
data.description: After months of planning starting in April, the board has made a decision based on the initial proposal put forth by LaRose and Treasurer Sprague.

data.title: Nansen reveals AI for crypto traders, plans autonomous trading by Q4. AI simplifies onchain trading for Ethereum and EVM networks.
data.description: Nansen has revealed a new artificial intelligence agent designed to streamline on-chain cryptocurrency trading through natural language conversation. The purpose is to enhance the value of Ethereum and EVM networks by making trading processes more accessible and user-friendly.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin discusses how Fusaka's PeerDAS will help Ethereum scale on layer 2.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, the co-founder of Ethereum, discussed how Fusaka's PeerDAS functionality aims to tackle the scaling challenges faced by Ethereum's layer 2 solutions. The feature is designed to enhance Ethereum's scalability and efficiency by leveraging innovative PeerDAS technology. This development comes at a time when Ethereum is experiencing significant scaling issues, with transaction costs reaching all-time highs. Buterin's endorsement of Fusaka's PeerDAS underscores its potential to alleviate Ethereum's bottlenecks and improve its overall performance.

data.title: M31 introduces Ultra Low Power Memory Compilers on TSMC N6e™ - enhancing AIoT innovation. #M31 #AIoT #TSMC #N6eplatform
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Hsinchu, M31 Technology Corporation unveiled its newest memory compilers, including Ultra-Low Leakage (ULL), Extreme Low Leakage (ELL), and Low-VDD operation options. These cutting-edge products were introduced at the 2025 TSMC North America Open event. M31 is a prominent silicon intellectual property (IP) provider known for innovation in this field. The memory compilers offer leading-edge performance, catering to the demands of modern technological advancements.

data.title: TomTom introduces "Tom by TomTom" road alert assistant & new app to enhance driving experience, offering essential alerts to users.
data.description: TomTom (TOM2) unveiled its latest product, Tom by TomTom, a road alert assistant designed to provide vital alerts to drivers, enhancing their experience on the road. Launched in Amsterdam on September 25, 2025, the new product aims to streamline the driving experience by delivering only essential notifications. Paired with the recently released TomTom app, a complimentary driving tool, this combination offers a comprehensive solution for motorists. By utilizing these two offerings, drivers can remain updated on unexpected road conditions and situations, ensuring a safer and more efficient journey.

data.title: DEME's joint venture CDWE wins contract for Formosa 4 offshore wind farm in Taiwan, includes 35 foundations and substation installation.
data.description: A significant contract has been awarded to DEME's Taiwanese joint venture, CDWE, for the Formosa 4 offshore wind farm in Taiwan. The contract entails the transport and installation of 35 foundations and the offshore substation, along with conducting scour protection works.
